---
title: "Contact"
subtitle: "Get in touch with the Spatial Geography Lab"
page-layout: article
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

::: {.page-header}
# Contact Us
We'd love to hear from you
:::

## Get In Touch

Whether you're a prospective student, potential collaborator, or interested in our Python/R tools, GEE scripts, or field survey protocols, we welcome your inquiries.

---

## Contact Information

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-icon}
<i class="fas fa-envelope"></i>
:::
### Email
**General Inquiries**
[contact@spatialgeolab.org](mailto:contact@spatialgeolab.org)

**Lab Director**
[director@spatialgeolab.org](mailto:director@spatialgeolab.org)
:::

::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-icon}
<i class="fas fa-phone"></i>
:::
### Phone
**Main Office**
[Phone Number Placeholder]

**Lab Direct Line**
[Phone Number Placeholder]

*Available Mon–Fri, 9 AM – 5 PM*
:::

::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-icon}
<i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i>
:::
### Address
**Spatial Geography Lab**
[Department Placeholder]
[Building & Room Placeholder]
[University/Institution Placeholder]
[City, State, ZIP Placeholder]
:::

:::

---

## Send Us a Message

::: {.contact-form}

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/example" method="POST">

::: {.form-group}
<label for="name"><i class="fas fa-user"></i> Full Name</label>
<input type="text" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Your full name" required>
:::

::: {.form-group}
<label for="email"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> Email Address</label>
<input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="your.email@example.com" required>
:::

::: {.form-group}
<label for="affiliation"><i class="fas fa-university"></i> Affiliation / Organization</label>
<input type="text" id="affiliation" name="affiliation" placeholder="Your university or organization">
:::

::: {.form-group}
<label for="subject"><i class="fas fa-tag"></i> Subject</label>
<select id="subject" name="subject" required>
<option value="" disabled selected>Select a topic...</option>
<option value="collaboration">Research Collaboration</option>
<option value="student">Student Inquiry (PhD / Postdoc)</option>
<option value="data">Data / Code Access Request</option>
<option value="tools">Questions about Python/R/GEE Tools</option>
<option value="field">Field Survey Collaboration</option>
<option value="speaking">Speaking / Seminar Invitation</option>
<option value="general">General Question</option>
</select>
:::

::: {.form-group}
<label for="message"><i class="fas fa-comment-alt"></i> Message</label>
<textarea id="message" name="message" placeholder="Tell us about your inquiry..." required></textarea>
:::

<button type="submit" class="btn-primary-custom" style="width: 100%; justify-content: center; border-radius: 0.75rem;">
<i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i> Send Message
</button>

</form>

:::

---

## Connect With Us Online

::: {.grid-4}

::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-icon}
<i class="fab fa-github"></i>
:::
### GitHub
[spatialgeography](https://github.com/spatialgeography)
Open-source tools, GEE scripts, & code
:::

::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-icon}
<i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i>
:::
### LinkedIn
[Spatial Geography Lab](https://www.linkedin.com/company/spatial-geography-lab)
Professional network & updates
:::

::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-icon}
<i class="fab fa-youtube"></i>
:::
### YouTube
[@spatialgeolab](https://www.youtube.com/@spatialgeolab)
Tutorials, seminars, & demos
:::

::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-icon}
<i class="fab fa-twitter"></i>
:::
### Twitter / X
[@spatialgeolab](https://twitter.com/spatialgeolab)
Latest news & research updates
:::

:::

---

## Open Positions

We are seeking motivated individuals with skills in deep learning, machine learning, Python/R programming, GEE, QGIS, or field survey methods:

::: {.grid-2}

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.resource-icon}
<i class="fas fa-user-graduate"></i>
:::
### PhD Studentship — Deep Learning for Land Cover Mapping
**Start Date:** [Placeholder] | **Duration:** 3–4 years | **Funding:** Fully funded

We seek a motivated PhD candidate to develop deep learning architectures for automated LULC classification from satellite imagery with field-based ground validation. Skills required: Python (TensorFlow/PyTorch), remote sensing fundamentals, willingness to conduct field surveys.

[<i class="fas fa-file-alt"></i> View Details & Apply](#){.btn-primary-custom style="font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 0.6rem 1.5rem; margin-top: 1rem;"}
:::

::: {.resource-card}
::: {.resource-icon}
<i class="fas fa-flask"></i>
:::
### Research Associate — GEE & Machine Learning
**Start Date:** [Placeholder] | **Duration:** 2 years | **Funding:** Fully funded

Looking for a research associate with experience in Google Earth Engine, machine learning (R/Python), and field-based data collection. The role involves developing GEE workflows, ML models, and conducting ground-truth surveys.

[<i class="fas fa-file-alt"></i> View Details & Apply](#){.btn-primary-custom style="font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 0.6rem 1.5rem; margin-top: 1rem;"}
:::

:::

---

::: {.info-box}
#### <i class="fas fa-clock"></i> Response Time
We typically respond to inquiries within 2–3 business days. For urgent matters, please call our main office directly.
:::
